question: Create a snapshot of the Ubuntu VM named LABO02_BASELINE_START using virsh.
validation_script:
#!/bin/bash
if virsh snapshot-list ubuntu-vm | grep -q LABO02_BASELINE_START; then
  exit 0
else
  exit 1
fi
